mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, name, description, avatar_url, following_count, followers_count, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{description}, #{avatarUrl}, #{followingCount}, #{followersCount}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user
AND (username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
